entries.definition:
وَاقٍ wāqin [act. part.] protector, defender (13:34) وَمَا لَهُمْ مِنَ اللَّهِ مِنْ
وَاقٍ and there will not be for them, against God, any defender.

تَقِيّ taqiyy [quasi-act. part.] devout, pious, mindful of God,
God-fearing (19:18) إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِالرَّحْمَنِ مِنْكَ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَقِيًّا I seek the Lord of
Mercy’s protection against you if you are God-fearing (or, if you
are a pious person or, if you are mindful of Him).

تُقَاة tuqātun I [v. n.] being mindful, being in awe, fearing
(3:102) اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ حَقَّ تُقَاتِهِ be mindful of God as is His due II [n./v. n.]
fear, danger, wariness (3:28) إِلَّا أَنْ تَتَّقُوا مِنْهُمْ تُقَاةً except when you are
warily guarding against danger from them [also interpreted as:
you are greatly fearing them].

تَقْوَى taqwā [n.] mindfulness of God, awareness of God, piety
(91:8) فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَاهَا so He instilled into it [the capacity for]
its lewdness (or, rebellion) and its piety.

مُتَّقُون muttaqūn [pl. of act. part. مُتَّقٍ muttaqī] those who are
mindful of God, the pious (39:33) وَالَّذِي جَاءَ بِالصِّدْقِ وَصَدَّقَ بِهِ أُولَئِكَ هُمُ
الْمُتَّقُونَ he who brings the truth and accepts it—those are the [truly]
pious.

entries.definition:
w–k–ʾ walking stick; food and nourishment; to lean, to recline;
to tie up, to tighten up. Of this root, four forms occur 11 times in
the Qur’an: أَتَوَكَّأ ʾatawakkaʾ once; يَتَّكِئُون yattakiʾūn once; مُتَّكِئُون
muttakiʾūn eight times and مُتَّكَأ muttakaʾ once.

أَتَوَكَّأ ʾatawakkaʾ [imperf. of v. V, intrans.] to lean on (20:18) هِيَ
عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّأُ عَلَيْهَا it is my staff, on which I lean.

يَتَّكِئُ yattakiʾ [imperf. of v. VIII اِتَّكَأ ʾittakaʾa, intrans.] to
recline, to sit (43:34) وَسُرُرًا عَلَيْهَا يَتَّكِئُونَ and couches upon which
they recline.

مُتَّكِئُون muttakiʾūn [pl. of act. part. مُتَّكِئ muttakiʾ] reclining,
sitting (36:56) عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ مُتَّكِئُونَ on couches reclining.

مُتَّكَأ muttakaʾ [n. of place] a couch, a seat [also interpreted as a
banquet] (12:31) وَأَعْتَدَتْ لَهُنَّ مُتَّكَأً and she prepared for them a
banquet/a [cushioned] couch.

1044
